data.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation complete ✓ — Updated: (1) test-end-session-rationalized-failures.sh: test_step_references_tk_list_bug → test_step_references_ticket_list_bug; (2) test-end-session-error-sweep.sh: _mock_tk_list_* → _mock_ticket_list_*; (3) test_task_execution_template.py: updated docstrings from tk create to ticket create, updated regex from tk create to ticket create; (4) test_end_session_no_auto_sync.py: updated to check ticket sync instead of tk sync.
